<< LATE REPORT >> POOL CAGE DESTROYED ON ONE HOME IN ROTONDA NEIGHBORHOOD, A FEW SMALL BRANCHES DOWN, NO DAMAGE TO HOMES NEXT DOOR EXCEPT FOR A FEW SHINGLES. THREE BLOCKS AWAY THERE WAS A SMALL PART OF A ROOF UPLIFTED ON ANOTHER HOME. NO DAMAGE TO SOFFITS OR SCREEN DOOR UNDER DAMAGE. WILL LABEL THIS AS THUNDERSTORM WIND DAMAGE. WILL CHANGE TO A BRIEF TORNADO IF EVIDENCE SUPPORTS IT.

THREE BLOCKS AWAY THERE WAS A SMALL PART OF A ROOF UPLIFTED ON ANOTHER HOME. NO DAMAGE TO SOFFITS OR SCREEN DOOR UNDER DAMAGE. WILL LABEL THIS AS THUNDERSTORM WIND DAMAGE. BROADCAST MEDIA REPORTED WIND DAMAGE TO MOBILE HOMES IN THE VICINITY OF 53RD AND CHATEAU LANE WEST. THIS DAMAGE APPEARS TO HAVE BEEN CAUSED BY A DOWNBURST. TIME ESTIMATED BY RADAR.

MANATEE CO EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT RELAYED THAT DAMAGE IN A MOBILE HOME COMMUNITY OCCURRED THIS AFTERNOON DURING A THUNDERSTORM. WHILE A DOWNBURST DID OCCUR WITH THIS STORM, IT IS SUSPECTED THAT THE DOWNBURST INDUCED BRIEF ROTATION IN THE STORM THAT APPEARS TO HAVE BEEN STRONG ENOUGH TO HAVE POSSIBLE CAUSED A BRIEF LANDSPOUT. THIS IS A PRELIMINARY ASSESSMENT PENDING FURTHER INVESTIGATION. TIME ESTIMATED FROM RADAR.
